description: A ground-level photograph showing a residential urban area. A paved road occupies the foreground, leading towards a cluster of multi-storey residential buildings in the background. On the right side of the road, a yellow-curbed grass verge is visible, while on the left, a green fence separates the road from a grassy slope with trees. The residential buildings feature red and yellow facades. The sky is clear blue. This image is a ground reference photograph consistent with the definition of 'Dense Urban Fabric' (CORINE Land Cover Class 1.1.1.2), where Imperviousness Density (IM.D) is typically between 30% and 80%. Such images are used for photo-interpretation and validation of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) products like the High Resolution Layer (HRL) Imperviousness Density (IM.D).
